extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims a laptop corner is dented.

image_assessments.notes: A laptop is visible from the rear, showing the body and lid, but no damage is apparent on the corner.
A close-up of a laptop corner clearly shows a dent on the surface.

result.user_claim: Customer: My laptop slipped while I was packing my bag. | Support: What part should we review? | Customer: One corner of the laptop is dented now. | Support: Is this about the body, screen, or keyboard? | Customer: Body only, specifically the laptop corner dent.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed corner with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed corner with visible dent. Supporting images: img_2.
